title: JavaScript Overview Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on the history, purpose, and key features of JavaScript.

questions.question: Which of these is NOT one of the three core web technologies?
Which of these is the official standard for JavaScript?
What is the primary role of JavaScript in web development?
options: Providing the structure of a page.
Defining the visual design and layout.
Managing only the database side of an application.
